_publications._publicationTitle: A genetic mouse model with postnatal

_contextSnippet: Tamoxifen administration to 1- to 2-month-old Lats1 fl/+ ;Lats2 fl/fl ;Plp-CreER (Lats-Plp) mice resulted in dozens of firm, slow-growing dermal tumors in each mouse...with 100% penetrance
details: Tamoxifen administration to 1-2 month old mice resulted in 100% penetrance of tumor formation with dozens of firm, slow-growing dermal tumors in each mouse
